xwikidoc.name: ConfluencePluginDocumentationClassSheet
xwikidoc.creator: xwiki:XWiki.Admin
xwikidoc.author: xwiki:XWiki.Admin
xwikidoc.content: {{velocity}} #set ($className = 'DocApp.Code.Confluence.ConfluencePluginDocumentationClass') #set ($obj = $doc.getObject($className)) #if ($obj != $NULL) #if ($xcontext.action == 'edit') #set($class = $obj.xWikiClass) (% class="xform" %) ((( #foreach($property in $class.properties) ; {{html clean="false"}} $!property.hint {{/html}} : $doc.display($property.name) #end ))) #else #if ("$!obj.get('url')" != '') Documentation URL: $doc.display('url') #end #if ("$!obj.get('marketPlaceURL')" != '') Atlassian marketplace URL: $doc.display('marketPlaceURL') #end #if ("$!obj.get('pluginName')" != '') Plugin name: $doc.display('pluginName') #end #if ("$!obj.get('publisher')" != '') Plugin publisher: $doc.display('publisher') #end $doc.display('description') #if ("$!obj.get('id')" != '') Confluence plugin id: $doc.display('id') #end #if ("$!doc.content" != '') == Additional information == $doc.display('additionalInfo') #end == Imported macros == {{children/}} #end #end {{/velocity}}
